instant.step1_subtitle: Each layout ships with its own structural metaphor and rule-set.
instant.topic_placeholder: e.g. Growth mindset tips for entrepreneurs
instant.topic_helper: Be specific — a focused topic produces a sharper infographic.
instant.step2_subtitle: Auto walks the fallback chain on retryable failure.
instant.step3_subtitle: One short phrase — we'll handle the rest.
instant.offer_copy_placeholder: Paste the offer copy, or click Fetch above to pull from a URL.
instant.output_language_helper_ar_no_provider: Arabic output quality depends on provider availability. We'll automatically route your request to the best supported provider.
instant.output_language_helper_ar_with_provider: Arabic output is automatically routed to a supported provider.
instant.error_no_topic: Please enter a topic before generating.
instant.error_arabic_no_provider: No Arabic-capable provider is currently available. Please select English or French output.

ads.step1_title: Enter your product or offer URL
ads.step2_subtitle: Auto walks the fallback chain on retryable failure.
ads.step3_subtitle: Paste a landing page URL — we'll pull the copy. Or fill in by hand.
ads.offer_copy_placeholder: Paste the offer copy, or click Fetch above to pull from a URL.
ads.output_language_helper_ar_no_provider: Arabic output quality depends on provider availability. We'll automatically route your request to the best supported provider.
ads.output_language_helper_ar_with_provider: Arabic output is automatically routed to a supported provider.
ads.error_scrape_failed: Could not extract content from this URL. Please try a different page.
ads.error_arabic_no_provider: No Arabic-capable provider is currently available. Please select English or French output.

shared.pick_layout_hint: Pick a layout and fill in the inputs to render.
shared.billing_copy: Generations go through your BYOK key if one is saved under Settings → API Keys. Otherwise the platform-shared key is used. Either way the render is uploaded to your Media Library so you can re-use it.

workspace.create_error: Could not create workspace. Please try again.

connections.relogin_hint: Sign in again to view connections

createPost.uploadMedia: Upload at least one media file
createPost.uploadCarousel: Upload at least 2 files for carousel

media.title: Media
media.dragDropPaste: Drag and drop media URL or paste content

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.storiesNote: Stories are only available for FB and IG.

captions.title: Captions
captions.sameForAll: Use same caption for all platforms
captions.noAccountsDesc: Pick accounts in the Accounts card to write platform-specific captions.

cover.frameDesc: Select a frame from your video to use as the cover image
cover.customDesc: Upload your own custom thumbnail image (instead of frame)

outpaint.generatingDesc: Engine is creating {count} variants. This usually takes 20–60 seconds.
outpaint.generatingDescNoCount: Engine is creating platform variants. This usually takes 20–60 seconds.
outpaint.engineJobLostDesc: The engine restarted mid-generation. Please try again.
outpaint.tookTooLongDesc: We waited 2 minutes. Please try again with fewer platforms.
outpaint.allVariants: Sent to all {count} platform(s) with AI-tailored variants.

calendar.post_details_subtitle: View and manage your social media post
calendar.caption: Caption
calendar.title: Title
calendar.discussion_desc: Comment on any post and @mention teammates
calendar.delete_confirm: Delete {count} selected post(s)? This cannot be undone.
calendar.delete_error: Could not delete {count} post(s). Please try again.
calendar.bulk_delete_error: Bulk delete failed. Please try again.

drafts.page_subtitle: View and manage all your draft posts. Edit, schedule, or publish them when you're ready.
drafts.delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete this draft?
drafts.empty_subtitle: Start creating a post and save it as a draft to see it here.
drafts.save_first: Save a draft first to enable Continue

history.page_subtitle: See what got published and what failed. Audit outcomes, retry failures, and export the log.
history.empty_subtitle: Publish or schedule a post to start the log. Past attempts show here with status, platform, and timestamp.

bulkSchedule.page_subtitle: Upload multiple images and videos to schedule them all at once with individual settings.
bulkSchedule.drop_zone_desc: Drag and drop up to {max} image or video files, or click to browse
bulkSchedule.drop_zone_footnote: Supports MP4, MOV, JPG, PNG • Max {maxSize}MB per file
bulkSchedule.csv_hint: Have a CSV? Upload captions + schedules in bulk (no media).
bulkSchedule.customize_subtitle: Customize captions, accounts, and times for each.
bulkSchedule.caption_placeholder: Write your caption for this post...
bulkSchedule.stories_note: Stories are only available for FB and IG.
bulkSchedule.no_accounts_warning: No accounts selected — this post won't publish anywhere.
bulkSchedule.empty_subtitle: Upload your media files to get started. Each file will become a customizable post with individual settings.
bulkSchedule.empty_step1_desc: Choose your brand and default social platforms on the left
bulkSchedule.empty_step2_desc: Drag & drop up to {max} images or videos at once
bulkSchedule.empty_step3_desc: Set captions, times, and schedule all posts together
bulkSchedule.tip_scheduler_desc: Set start date, posts per day, and intervals. Then click Apply to automatically assign date & time to all your posts at once.
bulkSchedule.tip_ai_desc: Generate captions for all posts using AI after uploading your media files.
bulkSchedule.csv_missing_column: CSV is missing the required "caption" column.
bulkSchedule.none_ready: None of the items are ready. Add captions and select at least one platform per item.
bulkSchedule.ai_generated: AI captions generated for {n} of {m} items.

queue.page_subtitle: Posts queued and waiting to publish, in the order they'll go live.
queue.n8n_warning: n8n webhook not configured — worker can't publish.
queue.empty_subtitle: Schedule a post from the composer and it will appear here, ready to publish at its scheduled time.
queue.reschedule_desc: Pick a new time for this post. It will resume from paused if needed.
queue.cancel_desc: This will permanently remove the post "{caption}" from your queue. You can re-create it from a draft if needed.
queue.post_paused_desc: It will not publish until you resume it.
queue.post_resumed_desc: It will publish at the scheduled time.
queue.post_duplicated_desc: Open the draft to schedule it.

commandCenter.page_subtitle: Live view of what's publishing right now, what's stuck, and what's failing.
commandCenter.inflight_empty: No posts are publishing right now. Things are quiet.
commandCenter.worker_idle_msg: Worker is idle — nothing being published.
commandCenter.failed_empty: No failed posts. Everything published cleanly.

analytics.page_subtitle: Track your social media performance and insights
analytics.no_post_data: Post-level metrics will appear here once individual post data is ingested.
analytics.no_data: No analytics data yet for this account.
analytics.no_data_sub: Once posts are published, daily metrics will appear here within 24 hours.

reports.page_subtitle: Generate branded PDF reports of your analytics performance.
reports.title: Title
reports.branding_subtitle: Customize how your PDF reports and shared report pages look.
reports.empty_subtitle: Generate your first report to see it here.
reports.scheduled_subtitle: Send recurring branded reports to your team and clients on autopilot.
reports.schedules_empty_sub: Click New schedule to set one up.
reports.toast_recipient_required: At least one recipient is required

inbox.page_subtitle: Manage comments and DMs across all your accounts
inbox.comments_empty_sub: When someone comments on your posts, they'll show up here.
inbox.messages_empty_sub: New direct messages will appear here in real-time.
inbox.select_conversation_sub: Choose a message from the list to view and reply.

assets.page_subtitle: Manage all your media assets and content library. Upload, organize, and reuse your visual content across all your social media platforms.
assets.upload_subtitle: Upload images, videos, or documents to your media library.
assets.supported_formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, HEIC, MP4, MOV, PDF
assets.empty_subtitle: Upload your first image, video, or document to get started.

landing.page_subtitle: Render on-brand social infographics and offer ads in one pass — choose a tool to get started.
landing.instant_summary: Type a topic and pick a layout. We render a finished, on-brand social infographic in one pass.
landing.instant_bullet1: 30 viral layouts — roadmap, decision tree, mistakes, myth-vs-truth, before/after, and more
landing.instant_bullet2: Hook-first composition: bold headline, strong middle, save/share footer
landing.instant_bullet3: Three colour schemes — light, dark, brand
landing.ads_summary: Paste a landing-page URL and we pull the offer copy for you, then render a scroll-stopping ad.
landing.ads_bullet1: Server-side URL fetch — no extra browser extension required
landing.ads_bullet2: 20 ad layouts — offer snapshot, value stack, transformation path, audience fit, and more
landing.ads_bullet3: Footer CTA + offer title carry straight through to the image
landing.hint_media_desc: Every render is uploaded to Bunny CDN and indexed under your workspace with the right tags.
landing.hint_provider_desc: Gemini Flash Lite Image (default) → GPT Image 2 → Ideogram 4 → Gemini Flash Image. Walks the chain on retryable failure.
landing.hint_byok_desc: Drop your own OpenRouter, OpenAI, or Ideogram keys under Settings → API Keys to bill generations to your own account.

brands.page_subtitle: Create workspaces to group your social media accounts & posts.
brands.empty: No workspaces yet. Create your first one to get started.
brands.create_subtitle: Connect your social accounts under this workspace later.
brands.name: Name
brands.knowledge_base_hint: Extra context to help the AI write more accurate inbox replies.
brands.delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete this brand? This action will remove all associated social media accounts and cannot be undone.
brands.team_subtitle: Manage team members and their roles for {name}
brands.team_empty_sub: Invite team members to collaborate on this workspace
brands.toast_edit_only_active: Only the active workspace can be edited
brands.toast_delete_only_active: Only the active workspace can be deleted
brands.toast_delete_not_supported: Workspace "{name}" deletion is not supported yet

accounts.page_subtitle: Connect and manage your social media accounts
accounts.session_hint: Try logging out and logging back in first — this usually fixes a stale session cookie. If a fresh login still fails, the server's FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY env var is the placeholder text instead of a real PEM.
accounts.firebase_not_configured: The server-side Firebase Admin SDK is not configured. Paste the real FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY into the host environment, then redeploy.
accounts.connected_subtitle: Manage your connected social media accounts
accounts.connect_hint: Use the "Connect" buttons below to link your social media accounts.
accounts.browser_hint: Connection works best on Chrome or Edge.
accounts.privacy_note: We only request permissions to schedule posts. Passwords are never stored. Disconnect anytime in settings.
accounts.integrations_subtitle: Connect cloud storage and design tools to import media directly into your posts.
accounts.integrations_privacy: Integrations use your own provider credentials and are stored encrypted. They only get used to import media for your posts — never to send messages, post, or access private data.
accounts.unsplash_desc: Browse and import royalty-free photos directly into your posts.
accounts.google_drive_desc: Pick images, videos, and PDFs straight from your Drive folders.
accounts.canva_desc: Import your Canva designs and edit them in a click.
accounts.dropbox_desc: Browse and import files from any Dropbox folder.
accounts.integration_revoke_note: You can revoke access anytime from here or from your provider account.
accounts.integration_after_credentials: After adding credentials in Settings, come back and click below to enable importing.
accounts.unsplash_step1: Create a free developer account at unsplash.com/developers.
accounts.unsplash_step2: Register a new app to obtain an Access Key.
accounts.unsplash_step3: Paste the Access Key into PostPlanify → Settings → Integrations → Unsplash.
accounts.gdrive_step1: Open Google Cloud Console and create (or select) a project.
accounts.gdrive_step2: Enable the Google Drive API and configure an OAuth consent screen.
accounts.gdrive_step3: Create OAuth credentials and paste the Client ID + Secret into PostPlanify → Settings → Integrations → Google Drive.
accounts.canva_step1: Sign up for the Canva Developers program and create an integration.
accounts.canva_step2: Add PostPlanify as an authorized redirect URI.
accounts.canva_step3: Copy the Client ID and Secret into PostPlanify → Settings → Integrations → Canva.
accounts.dropbox_step1: Go to the Dropbox App Console and create a scoped app (Full Dropbox).
accounts.dropbox_step2: Set the OAuth 2 redirect URI to the app's callback URL.
accounts.dropbox_step3: Paste the App key and secret into PostPlanify → Settings → Integrations → Dropbox.
accounts.remove_body: This hides {handle} from this view. To fully revoke at source, disconnect it from your upload-post.com dashboard.
accounts.toast_popup_blocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site.
accounts.toast_removed: Account removed from view. To revoke at source, open the connect page and unlink it.
accounts.hint_session: Session can't be verified. Try logging out and logging back in first.
accounts.hint_missing_secret: Server is missing a required secret. Set it on the host and redeploy.
accounts.hint_upstream_down: Upstream service (upload-post.com) is unreachable. Try Refresh in a minute.

list.page_subtitle: Reply automatically when someone comments with a keyword, follows you, or posts their first comment.
list.empty_subtitle: Create a campaign to reply automatically when a comment, follow, or first-comment event matches your trigger.
list.delete_confirm: Delete this AutoDM campaign? This cannot be undone.

edit.trigger_keyword_desc: Reply when someone comments with a specific word/phrase.
edit.trigger_first_comment_desc: Reply to anyone who comments on your post for the first time.
edit.trigger_new_follower_desc: Welcome new followers with a DM.
edit.cap_hint: Limits sends to the same author in a 24h window to avoid spam.
edit.daily_cap_desc: Limits sends to the same author in a 24h window to avoid spam.

new.page_subtitle: Set up the trigger, message template, and platforms.
new.trigger_keyword_desc: Reply when someone comments with a specific word/phrase.
new.trigger_first_comment_desc: Reply to anyone who comments on your post for the first time.
new.trigger_new_follower_desc: Welcome new followers with a DM.
new.template_placeholder: Hey {{handle}}! Thanks for the comment — here's the link you asked for: https://…
new.cap_hint: Limits sends to the same author in a 24h window to avoid spam.

destinations.page_subtitle: Send publishing events to webhooks, Zapier, or your own endpoint whenever a post is published, fails, or is scheduled.
destinations.empty_subtitle: Add a webhook or Zapier hook to be notified when posts are published, scheduled, or fail.
destinations.create_subtitle: We'll send a signed POST to your URL when matching events occur.

main.page_subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences
main.account_subtitle: Update your account information and profile settings
main.canva_desc: Connect your Canva account to import your designs directly in PostPlanify when you are creating a new post.
main.gdrive_desc: Connect your Google Drive account to access and import files when you are creating a new post.
main.api_overrides_hint: Local-only dev overrides. In production, configure secrets via environment variables.
main.api_overrides_prod: Production build — overrides are not used.
main.api_overrides_warning: Values you enter below are stored in this browser only and never sent to the server in this build. Update the server env vars instead, then redeploy.
main.upload_post_hint: API key to fetch your connected social profiles
main.n8n_hint: Webhook endpoint triggered when you publish posts
main.bunny_password_hint: Access key for your Bunny storage container
main.notif_subtitle: Choose which alerts you want to receive and how often
main.notif_email_desc: Get a summary of activity at the cadence below.
main.notif_browser_desc: Receive browser push notifications for important alerts.
main.notif_post_published_desc: Notify when a scheduled post goes live.
main.notif_post_failed_desc: Notify when a post fails to publish so you can retry.
main.notif_new_comment_desc: Notify when a new comment arrives in your social inbox.
main.notif_new_dm_desc: Notify when a new DM arrives in your social inbox.
main.notif_weekly_report_desc: Send a recap of performance every Monday morning.
main.sub_subtitle: Manage your subscription and billing information
main.sub_missing_env: Stripe billing requires STRIPE_SECRET_KEY env var.
main.password_desc: Choose a new password. Use at least 8 characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.
main.photo_remove_body: This will permanently remove your profile photo. You can upload a new one anytime.
main.cancel_sub_body: Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period. After that, your account will switch to the Free plan and you'll lose access to premium features.
main.toast_photo_selected: Photo selected. Click Save to apply.
main.toast_photo_removed: Photo removed. Click Save to apply.
main.toast_canva_connected: Canva connected. Add your API credentials on the Accounts page for full setup.
main.toast_gdrive_connected: Google Drive connected. Add your API credentials on the Accounts page for full setup.

branding.page_subtitle: Customize the client portal with your brand name, logo, color, and domain.
branding.domain_hint: CNAME this to the portal domain to enable.
branding.white_label_desc: Hide branding on the client-facing portal and reports.
branding.hide_badge_desc: Removes the 'Powered by' footer credit on exports.

apiKeys.page_subtitle: Connect PostPlanify to your own tools with our REST API.
apiKeys.docs_banner: Full reference, code samples, and webhook events at the docs site.
apiKeys.empty_title: No API keys yet. Generate your first key to get started.
apiKeys.dialog_subtitle: Create a new API key for programmatic access.
apiKeys.dialog_copy_hint: Your API key has been generated. Copy it now — you won't be able to see it again.
apiKeys.revoke_confirm: Revoke this API key? This cannot be undone.

main.page_subtitle: Create a customizable landing page for your social media profiles
main.delete_desc: Permanently remove your bio page and all analytics data.
main.delete_confirm_body: This will permanently remove your bio page and all analytics data.
main.delete_confirm_detail: Your bio page at {url} will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

claim.page_subtitle: Create a customizable landing page for your social media profiles
claim.claim_desc: Choose a username for your bio page
claim.feature_links_desc: Add as many as you need

sections.page_settings_desc: Configure your bio page URL and profile information
sections.bio_placeholder: A short description about you or your brand
sections.links_desc: Add and reorder your links. Drag to reorder.
sections.social_desc: Add your social media profiles to show icons on your page
sections.theme_desc: Choose a theme and optionally customize colors
sections.analytics_desc: Track page views and link clicks
sections.share_hint: — Share your bio link to track performance.
sections.no_data: No data yet. Share your bio link to start tracking!

renderer.empty_links: Add links to see them here

labels.page_subtitle: Organize posts into campaigns and themes.
labels.empty: No labels yet. Create your first label to organize posts.
labels.dialog_subtitle: Create a label to organize your posts.

hashtags.page_subtitle: Save hashtag sets so you never have to retype them.
hashtags.empty: No hashtag sets yet. Create one to speed up your posts.
hashtags.trending_empty: No trending data yet. Analytics will populate this as posts are published.
hashtags.separator_hint: Separate tags with commas or spaces.
